title: PERT CPM - Critical Path
excerpt:
It would be great if we had a board view displaying PERT-CPM and including the critical path.  The critical path in PERT-CPM seems a little more elaborate than the critical path in Gant Charts. 
Please see this video:  P…

posts.author: Ciro (Mello)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if we had a board view displaying PERT-CPM and including the critical path. The critical path in PERT-CPM seems a little more elaborate than the critical path in Gant Charts.

Please see this video: Project Scheduling - PERT/CPM | Finding Critical Path Project Scheduling - PERT/CPM | Finding Critical Path - YouTube

The information here may be useful too:

dspace.mit.edu

l2_networkplan.pdf

520.33 KB

ProjectManager

PERT Chart: The Ultimate Guide (with Examples)

Learn everything you need to know about PERT charts & how to make better estimates and project schedules with project management software.

Thank you!

posts.author: Usernamegame (Jake N)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello @Ciro I appreciated that PDF. Have you found a way to show/indicate the critical path on the board itself (vs in a gantt chart dashboard/widget)?

posts.author: Ciro (Mello)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jake ,

Thank you so much for contacting me!

I have not found out a way to share the critical path other than the Gantt (2023-11-20_10-22-53 - TechSmith Screencast - TechSmith Screencast). Would you please let me know if there is a different way? Or some way like the PERT- CPM that I shared? Thank you.

posts.author: GiCa (Gisèle Casabianca)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature would be a great addition to help shaping a project planning.

posts.author: AntoineHebert (AntoineHebert)
posts.cookedHtml: Visuals make everything clearer! Checked out the video you shared, pretty insightful stuff. Also, thanks for the MIT link – always up for more resources. Speaking of project management, I recently discovered this IT asset management software called BlueTally. It’s been a game-changer for me in keeping things organized. You might find it handy too here’s the link https://bluetallyapp.com. Also, thanks for sharing that MIT resource, gonna dive into that PDF now. Btw, I’m kinda new here, so if you have any other gems to share or advice for a newbie, I’m all ears!

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I am an app developer from ThoughtFlow and we already have two apps on the marketplace.

I’m currently exploring building an app for PERT chart the dependency column. Would really appreciate if you could join a call to help me get a better understanding of this workflow?

Here’s my calendar - Calendly - Kranthi Kiran Pulluru
